channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Steam Controller Sells Out Almost Instantly, Valve States They Will Have A Restock Update 'Soon'
item.content:encoded:
It was probably inevitable, but Valve's hotly anticipated Steam Controller sold out yesterday in minutes, and the secondary market has already become flooded with scalpers looking to make a quick buck. 

Valve's new Steam Controller has been anticipated for months and thanks to some great reviews (we're still working on ours), the demand for Valve's new controller only got bigger in the lead up to launch day. So it's not surprising that, within minutes of going live, the controller was already sold out. 

Steam Controller ran out faster than we anticipated, and we hate that not everyone who wanted one was able to get it. We’re working on getting more in stock and will have an update on expected timeline soon.

— Valve (@valvesoftware) May 5, 2026

Valve admitted in a statement this morning that the controller sold faster than the company "anticipated," and that they "hate that not everyone who wanted one was able to get it." However, the company has also confirmed they are looking into getting more Controllers back in stock and will "have an update on expected timeline soon."

Meanwhile, as with everything tech in recent memory, scalpers have popped up listing the new controller at some outrageous prices, sometimes around $300 as of this writing. While some listings can be found around $220, most are sitting nearer the $300 price point, with one eBay lister putting out an exorbitant $39K offer on the site. 

The Steam Controller, not to be confused with the other Steam Controller that Valve released over ten years ago with the same exact name, features your standard controller layout, but with its own twist: two track pads below the thumbsticks to help controller players navigate mouse-heavy PC games. These trackpads are similar to what we see on the Steam Deck, but are actually more responsive in my testing, and I've found myself able to play games like EVE Online and The Lord of the Rings Online fairly well with them. We'll have our full review soon, but first impressions are definitely good. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/hardware/steam-controller-sells-out-almost-instantly-valve-states-they-will-have-a-restock-update-soon-2000137986
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 'Operation: Belly of the Beast' Returns to Warframe, Digital Extremes Opens TennoCon Digital & Merch Pack Sales
item.content:encoded:
Warframe brings back Operation: Belly of the Beast and it's time to get your clan to work together and take on threats across the Origin System. There are new and returning rewards to collect, as well as specials for those in clans. Digital Extremes has also just put TennoCon 2026 digital and merch packs on sale.

The clan event runs through June 1st at 2pm ET, and if you’ve completed the Jade Shadows quest and The New War, then you’re ready. Join up with your clan to get started, and take on the Jade Light Eximus units that spawn instead of regular Eximus units. Help Ordis to stop Parvis via one of three options. As you continue in the associated missions, you’ll access nodes that let you take on Parvos’ forces.  

This event is also preparation for the upcoming Jade Shadows: Constellations major update. 

Operation: Belly of the Beast  has a new Brutus node on Uranus and that itself comes with a new Operation variant that will have you beating back more Jade Light Eximus units. You can choose to summon a Sister of Parvos for more Volatile Motes to aid you.

There will also be timed Operation alerts across the Origin System. These non-Ascension missions award Volatile Motes. Collect these and a community counter will rise and make progress towards Collective rewards including a new variant of the Jade Light Ephemera.

There’s more to know about the Operation, as well as the long list of rewards, both new and returning.

TennoCon 2026 will return to London, Ontario Canada in July. Digital Extremes has just opened up sales for digital and merch packs. If you have a TennoCon ticket, you’ll get these packs automatically, but for the rest of us, These are ways to get your hands on special contents including the Hunhullus Ephemera, themed emote, glyph, sigil, and display for TennoCon2026, and more. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/operation-belly-of-the-beast-returns-to-warframe-digital-extremes-opens-tennocon-digital-and-merch-pack-sales-2000137983
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Conan Exiles Enahanced Is Live, Bringing Unreal Engine Upgrade, Huge Map Merge And More
item.content:encoded:
The recently-announced Enhanced version of Conan Exiles has gone live, launching an overhaul of the entire game’s systems and graphics just ahead of its eighth anniversary. 

At the heart of this upgrade is an upgrade to Unreal Engine 5, which also brings with it major visual updates and a huge install downsize from 105 GB to 61 GB. Crafting and building get a giant upgrade, allowing players to build with supplies from nearby chests. 

The Isle of Siptah and the Exiled Lands maps get a giant merge to allow for seamless movement between the two. If a map owner owns both, they have the option to have both included. Plus, the UI gets a neat overhaul for clarity and improvement.  

If you’ve made a mod for Conan Exiles, they do say it’s likely compatible, but “will require upgrading, recooking, and repackaging for UE5/Enhanced.” 

The Enhanced patch for Conan Exiles also generally comes with a ton of fixes that make up the bulk of the full patch notes, so if there’s something that’s been bug–ging you for a while (gaps on doors and around buildings, messed-up costumes, glitches and rubber-banding with dead enemies) there’s a chance it got fixed. 

The Unreal Engine 4 version of the game will continue to exist as a “Legacy” version, but there won’t be any further updates for it, and the Bazaar won’t exist there. Characters will have to be moved from the Legacy to Enhanced, or it can be played on private servers. 

Inflexion Studios, the team behind the steampunk fantasy survival game Nightingale, recently shared that it helped with this upgrade after seeing its own game go through a similar upgrade to Unreal Engine 5. 

With the launch, Funcom also dropped a trailer showing off how Conan Exiles Enhanced looks. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/conan-exiles-enahanced-is-live-bringing-unreal-engine-upgrade-huge-map-merge-and-more-2000137982
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: 'The Only Way', Second Update for Guild Wars 2: Visions of Eternity, is Coming Next Week
item.content:encoded:
The second update for Guild Wars 2: Visions of Eternity, “The Only Way”, is coming next Tuesday, May 12th. The update continues the story, adds a new zone,  two new mastery tiers, new relics, legendary accessories, and more.

“The Only Way” brings us back to the mysterious island of Castora, where you may have set down roots by the beach in a new homestead, but there’s a new threat brewing. The update has five new story chapters, with a new goal of stopping Vloxx and his plans for Tyria. The new chapters will bring us to a new map, Eternity’s Garden. 

The two new mastery tiers will offer account-wide horizontal progression opportunities. There are six new  relics in this update that you can earn and use to customize your builds. There are also new legendary accessories in this update, with one you can earn through PvE content and one through World vs. World. 

The release will also include a Wizard’s Vault refresh with new items and objectives, a raptor mount skin to earn, and more rewards and new content to discover. 

This is the second of the three planned major content updates in the Visions of Eternity expansion cycle. Looking ahead,  the final update will complete the story as well as add more new maps, instance content, more legendary gear, and more.

ANet released a trailer to accompany The Only Way’s announcement, and a “the story so far” video a few days ago. With the update just one week away, we expect to learn some more about what to expect in the coming days.



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/the-only-way-second-update-for-guild-wars-2-visions-of-eternity-is-coming-next-week-2000137980
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
